letter:
From the first frame to this moment, you have been the protagonist of every story worth telling.

Birthdays are just timestamps — but this one marks something different. You have grown into someone who changes rooms simply by entering them. Someone who listens like a camera holds focus: completely, generously, without rushing to the next shot.

This experience was made for you because you deserve more than a card. You deserve a film.

messagesFromGroup.name: John
messagesFromGroup.message: So proud of who you've become. Here's to the next chapter.

messagesFromGroup.name: Sarah
messagesFromGroup.message: You light up every room. Happy birthday, Ada!

messagesFromGroup.name: Marcus
messagesFromGroup.message: Still remember the day we met. You changed everything.

messagesFromGroup.name: Leila
messagesFromGroup.message: The kindest soul I know. This year is yours.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: Beginnings
chapters.content: It started with a hello that neither of us knew would matter. But the best stories always start that way — quietly, without fanfare, with no idea what they're becoming.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: The Memories We Made
chapters.content: Every photo, every voice note, every shared laugh — they were chapters being written in real time. We didn't know we were making something worth keeping. But we were.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: What We Never Said
chapters.content: There are things that go unsaid not from carelessness but from depth. This is that chapter. The one where we say them.

chapters.title: Chapter 4: Your Reward
chapters.content: For showing up, for being you, for making every room warmer — this one's yours.

chapters.title: Chapter 5: The Final Frame
chapters.content: Every great film ends with a frame you carry with you. This is ours.

questions.text: Where did we first meet Ada?
What does Ada always order at the café?

customClosingMessage: Crafted as a Signature Experience. For Ada, always.
